messages.author: Unknown

messages.author: Unknown
messages.content: Just try to focus more on the big shapes first

messages.author: Unknown
messages.content: use your own judgement, you should still be eyeballing the proportions and placements of the small shapes when refining. i think it would also depend on how much practice you want for yourself, when you break stuff down further you need to practice angle sighting more and well, shape break downs

messages.author: Unknown
messages.content: big -> medium -> small. if you leave stuff out in the medium stage you do more in the small stage, if you leave stuff out of the small stage you do more in the refinement stage. it depends
